top_signals.title: Container Ship Runs Aground Outside Iran-Approved Hormuz Route
top_signals.summary: Iran's state media said on Wednesday a foreign container ship ran aground in the Strait of Hormuz after entering shallow waters outside the shipping route designated by Iranian authorities.State media reiterated the Revolutionary Guards' warning that vessels should transit only through the corridor
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Aluminum Falls to Lowest Since February as Dollar Strengthens
top_signals.summary: Aluminum fell to the lowest since mid-February as a strengthening US dollar and the easing of tensions in the Middle East continued to pressure commodities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bulls are betting big on this global ETF that's deep in a bear market
top_signals.summary: U.S. stocks just keep winning, with the Nasdaq closing out its best quarter since 2020. Across the globe in China, things couldn't be more different.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI’s Trillion-Dollar Debt Binge Fuels Century-Old Private Market
top_signals.summary: A private bond market dating back more than a century is opening a new front in the trillion-dollar AI funding boom, allowing tech borrowers to sell debt directly to deep-pocketed insurance firms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. Treasury Yields, Dollar Rise - WSJ
top_signals.summary: U.S. Treasury Yields, Dollar Rise  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Gold set for worst quarter in over 10 years as retail interest cools
top_signals.summary: Gold is poised to enter its worst quarterly performance in over ten years, as retail investor enthusiasm fades and higher US interest rates loom, a far cry from last year’s continuous record-breaking prices. The price of the precious metal fell below $4,000 per troy ounce on Wednesday, hitting $3,978.5. On Tuesday it fell to $3,942.9, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Nike earnings helped by tariff refund but sales decline in China - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Nike earnings helped by tariff refund but sales decline in China  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: MacGregor Expands Offshore Crane Modernization Backlog
top_signals.summary: MacGregor has secured a series of offshore load handling modernization and upgrade contracts during the first half of 2026, strengthening its position in the offshore services market.The contracts, booked in the company's first- and second-quarter 2026 order intake…

top_signals.title: Anthropic rolls out Sonnet 5 with near-Opus 4.8 performance at a lower price
top_signals.summary: Anthropic is now rolling out Sonnet 5, and it's almost as good as the Opus range, but it is designed to be cheaper than the company's flagship model. [...]
